# Myrmekes

> Myrmekes supplies IT engineering resources, support contracts, and hardware
> fulfilment to end users across the UK, delivered by Cantel's engineers.
> Multi-vendor hardware support (Cisco, Microsoft, VMware, Dell, Dell EMC, HPE,
> NetApp, Fortinet and ~50 more), response tiers from 2-hour onsite to next
> business day, post-warranty and end-of-service-life (EOSL) support, and EUC
> device repair. UK-based engineers across six depots, coverage in 100+
> countries with trusted affiliates. Tagline: Multi Sumus ("we are many").

## Delivery partners and credentials

- Myrmekes works with [Cantel Computer Services](https://cantelsupport.com/) and [CloudCoCo](https://cloudcoco.co.uk/) to deliver services.
- Cantel's engineers deliver Myrmekes support. The 30+ years of delivery heritage, ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 certifications, and Certified B Corporation status shown on this site belong to Cantel, not Myrmekes.
- Cantel's B Corp status can be verified in the [B Lab directory](https://www.bcorporation.net/en-us/find-a-b-corp/company/cantel-computer-services-ltd/).
- UK services draw on 66 field engineers across six regional depots. International requirements can be coordinated through trusted affiliates in 100+ countries. Exact vendor, response, parts and geographic coverage is confirmed per engagement.

## Key pages

- [Services](https://myrmekes.co.uk/services.html): rack and stack, break/fix, post-warranty support, migrations, rollouts, IMACD, ITAD, network installation, and more, across eight service pillars.
- [Technology directory](https://myrmekes.co.uk/technology.html): searchable list of 56 supported vendors and technologies.
- [Support Contracts](https://myrmekes.co.uk/support-contracts.html): SLA tiers and how engagements work.
- [EUC Device Support](https://myrmekes.co.uk/euc-support.html): laptop/tablet/mobile repair cover, 72-hour turnaround.
- [FAQ](https://myrmekes.co.uk/faq.html): third-party maintenance, EOSL, exclusions, cleared engineers.
- [Case Studies](https://myrmekes.co.uk/case-studies.html): sector-anonymized delivery examples.
- [Contact](https://myrmekes.co.uk/contact.html): info@myrmekes.co.uk
